heading: Transfers from Department of Labor
label: 3443 Transfers from Department of Labor
notes: References in TextSection 601 of this Act, referred to in subsec. (a), is , which is set out as an Effective Date note under .section 601 of Pub. L. 96–88section 3401 of this title

children.heading: Functions relating to programs for the education of migrant and seasonal farmworkers
children.label: a Functions relating to programs for the education of migrant and seasonal farmworkers
children.text: Notwithstanding the provisions of section 601 of this Act, there shall be transferred to the Secretary, at such time on or after , as the Secretary certifies that there has been established in the Department a single component responsible for the administration and the coordination of programs relating to the education of migrants, all functions of the Secretary of Labor or the Department of Labor relating to such education.May 4, 1980

children.heading: Authorization to conduct functions
children.label: b Authorization to conduct functions
children.text: The Secretary is authorized to conduct the functions transferred by subsection (a).
